proposal.hypothesis: The exact Mission reaches a qualified stand, but the recovery child keeps advancing and reclassifies the pose during the cross-fade. Tracking the fixed standing target with live joint feedback should prevent a second recovery maneuver without freezing stale torques.
proposal.expectedEffect: Keep exact Missions upright through settling, enter locomotion without a recovery pose change, improve post-recovery tracking, and preserve isolated self-righting and recovery-handoff gates.
